name: MotherDuck (uvx)
description: Query data with DuckDB's analytical SQL across local DuckDB files, in-memory databases, S3, and the MotherDuck cloud. Run SQL and browse database catalogs. Read-only by default.

inputs.label: MotherDuck Token
inputs.description: MotherDuck access token, used to connect to the MotherDuck cloud (md: database path). Leave empty when using a local DuckDB file or :memory: instead.

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to MotherDuck
2. Open Settings > Access Tokens
3. Click Create token (Read/Write or Read Scaling)
4. Copy the token

auth.instructions: A MotherDuck access token is required only for the MotherDuck cloud (--db-path md:). Local DuckDB files and :memory: need no token.
